name: Pumpkin Squares
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together the first five ingredients. Set aside.
2. Beat eggs and sugars together until well combined.
3. Add remaining ingredients (nuts, mincemeat, pumpkin) to the egg mixture and mix just enough to combine the ingredients.
4. Pour the batter into a greased 13x9x2 inch baking pan.
5. Bake for 35 to 60 minutes, or until set.
6. Cool completely before frosting with Cream Cheese Frosting.
7. Cut into squares.
